title: senecio calvus
intro: Senecio calvus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antimicrobial protection. Senecio calvus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
